Title: Journey Together Sleeved Booster Pack - English

Title: Destined Rivals Booster Bundle - English
Description:
Whose side will you choose? Team Rocket is back with a bold new plan, and Trainers everywhere must decide whether to rise up as heroes or join forces with the villains. Battle alongside powerful duos like Cynthia & Garchomp ex, Ethan & Ho-Oh ex, or Arven & Mabosstiff ex—or stand with Giovanni and his legendary partner Mewtwo ex. The choice is yours in the Scarlet & Violet—Destined Rivals expansion!

This Booster Bundle is a great way to grow your collection. Inside, you’ll find:

  • 6 booster packs from Scarlet & Violet—Destined Rivals

  • Each pack contains 10 cards and 1 Basic Energy

  • Look for powerful new Pokémon ex, Trainer cards, and stunning Illustration Rares

Perfect for collectors and players alike, this bundle gives you a head start in choosing your side and building a deck worthy of your rivals.

Title: TCG Collector’s Desk Mat – Built for Hits, Binders & Bulk
Description:
Transform your setup into a true Trainer’s workspace with a desk mat designed for epic pulls, shiny hits, and serious TCG vibes. Whether you’re sorting bulk, showcasing rares, or ripping packs live on stream, this mat keeps your cards safe and your desk looking clean.

The smooth polyester surface is perfect for laying out cards, sliding sleeves, or gliding your mouse during late-night grinding sessions. The natural rubber base keeps the mat locked in place — even when the hype hits hard. With anti-fray stitched edges and durable materials, it’s built to handle years of collecting, trading, gaming, and streaming.

Choose your perfect fit — 23.6" × 13.8" or 31.5" × 15.5" — and upgrade your Poké-lab instantly.

Features

  • 100% polyester top for vibrant designs

  • 100% natural rubber non-slip backing

  • Smooth surface for cards, mice, and sleeves

  • Anti-fray stitched edges for long life

  • Supports optical and laser mice

  • Available in multiple Trainer-friendly sizes

  • Perfect for TCG collectors, Pokémon fans, and pack-opening streamers

Title: Poke6s' Boring Booster - English
Description:
💤 These are boring. And that’s the point.

This is a custom-sealed pack created by Poke6s, filled with 100% authentic Pokémon cards repackaged for collectors, players, and kids who just want to open some cards and have fun.

You won't find secret rares, double rares, or “bangers” here. Just a satisfying rip with guaranteed value:

Each Boring Booster includes:

  • 🟡 20 Authentic Pokémon Cards

  • ⭐ 2 Rares (including Holos)

  • ✴️ 4 Reverse Holos

  • 🔋 4 Energies

  • 📦 The rest: Commons, Uncommons, and Trainers

That’s it. No hype. No hits. No scams.

Great for binder fillers, card sorting, deck-building, and guilt-free rips. Just real cards for real collectors, and yeah, they’re kinda boring… but also kinda awesome.

🛑 NOT AN OFFICIAL BOOSTER PACK
